name: MSI MAG B660M MORTAR MAX WIFI DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-5333+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.2 (B660MMOMXD4)
shortName: MSI MAG B660M MORTAR MAX WIFI DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Compact gaming motherboard with LGA 1700 socket, DDR4 support, and Wi-Fi 6E connectivity.
